info.title: Auth
info.description: This API enables an application or service (by extension and organization) access the mapped resources that it has been granted to.

basicAuth.description: HTTP Basic Authentication using a Client Id and Client Secret.

post.summary: Provide Client and Merchant Credentials to obtain an Access Token.
post.description: An application's client id and secret can be found in the My Apps section of this portal. Please contact Equity Bank for merchant credentials.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Merchant Code, obtained after successful onboarding on the Merchant Portal.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: API Key, obtained after successful onboarding on the Merchant Portal.

parameters.name: merchant
parameters.description: Merchant Username, provided by Equity Bank.

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: The API resource that the Merchant has subscribed to during onboarding on the Merchant Portal.

400.description: Bad Request - Please ensure the request is valid.

401.description: Unauthorized - Please check the Authorization header.

404.description: Not Found - Please check the URL.

500.description: Internal Server Error - Please try later.

token_type.description: The type of token generated, the default is "bearer".

issued_at.description: A numeric timestamp of the date and time the token was generated.

expires_in.description: The duration in seconds after which the token expires, the default is 3599 (59 minutes and 59 seconds).

code.description: An error code that identifies the error.

error.description: The error encountered while processing the request.

message.description: A short description of the error.
